title: Battery Thermal Management Systems
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 2 — Battery thermal management JV connecting Saudi HVAC capability with EV battery technology
executive_summary:
Battery Thermal Management Systems (BTMS) — the cooling and heating systems that maintain EV battery packs within optimal temperature ranges — are among the most critical and technically demanding components in electric vehicles. Saudi Arabia's extreme ambient temperatures create unique BTMS challenges: cooling an EV battery pack to safe operating temperatures (below 45°C) when ambient air is 55°C requires far more capable cooling than standard EV designs provide. This Saudi-specific engineering challenge creates a genuine product differentiation opportunity.

Node AU-12 builds directly on AU-11 (HVAC Systems) and AU-5 (Hot-Climate Validation), combining automotive thermal management expertise with battery-specific cooling requirements. It also connects to DT-9 (Saudi brine lithium) and SC-4 (Saudi SiC power devices) — creating a Saudi EV supply chain cascade from materials to systems.

The global BTMS market was valued at $5.8 billion in 2024 growing at 28.4% CAGR — among the fastest-growing automotive components. Saudi Arabia's BTMS programme creates the foundation for Saudi EV manufacturing leadership in the Gulf's extreme climate niche.

companies.name: Valeo Thermal Management
